Home.title: Authentication and tenancy foundation for Hostinvo
Home.description: The platform now has the first secure layer for tenant-aware access: Sanctum SPA authentication, shared-schema tenant isolation, seeded roles and permissions, and localized auth routes in Next.js.
Home.backendDescription: Laravel 11 now exposes `/api/v1/auth/*`, resolves the current tenant from the authenticated user, and seeds the initial RBAC structure for later modules.
Home.frontendDescription: Next.js ships login, forgot-password, reset-password, and protected dashboard placeholders with English and Arabic labels plus HTML-level RTL switching.
Home.servicesDescription: Phase 2 stays focused on authentication and tenancy only. Billing, orders, provisioning, and support remain intentionally unimplemented.
Home.deliverable1: Sanctum SPA authentication foundation with CSRF cookie flow
Home.deliverable2: Tenant-aware user model, middleware, and global scope foundation
Home.deliverable3: Seeded roles, permissions, and default super admin account
Home.deliverable4: Localized auth pages and route protection in Next.js
Home.deliverable5: Protected dashboard placeholder for authenticated users

Auth.loginDescription: Authenticate with your Hostinvo account to access your tenant workspace.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and Hostinvo will send a password reset link.
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for your Hostinvo account.
Auth.resetPasswordPlaceholder: This page is ready for the password reset flow and uses the backend reset endpoint when a token is present.
Auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
Auth.forgotPasswordError: Unable to send the reset link.
Auth.tokenMissing: The reset token is missing. Open the link from your email to continue.
Auth.dashboardDescription: This placeholder confirms that the tenant-aware auth foundation is working before later modules are added.
Auth.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the authentication service.
